programme.title: Party Political Broadcast
programme.desc: By the Welsh Conservative Party(n)

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Magazine show, with stories of interest from around the UK, plus celebrity guests in the studio. Presented by Alex Jones and Matt Baker(n)

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Sacha prepares to perform a groundbreaking bowel transplant operation, but Max fears he is the wrong man for the job, given his recent bereavement and past struggles with mental health. Nicky is struggling to keep her debts under control, only to be confronted with her mother as a patient, who reveals that she now owes even more money. Donna encounters a casting director, and tries to get herself on his books(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jack is rushed to hospital after collapsing at the scene of a car crash, which Thomas suspects could be the result of exposure to the same nerve agent that was used on John Sealy. With Jack's life hanging in the balance, it falls to Nikki, Thomas and Clarissa to find the truth and save their friend(n)

programme.title: BBC Wales Live
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad and Bethan Rhys Roberts present a weekly show featuring stories and in-depth interviews about what is happening in Wales and why it matters(n)

programme.title: Eating with My Ex
programme.desc: Ayo is desperate to find out why his first love Felicia broke up with him out of the blue, and Michael and Casey wonder if they will ever be able to trust each other again(n)

programme.title: My Mate's a Bad Date
programme.desc: Self-confessed serial dater Tyler wants to find the male version of herself, so Oloni puts that idea to the test as he sets her up on three challenging dates(n)

programme.title: First & Last
programme.desc: Game show where contestants have to make sure they do not come first or last in any game or they will be eliminated. Eleven contestants start each show and compete across a range of five play-along-at-home games that will see one of them leave with a cash prize of up to £10,000. Hosted by Jason Manford(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Charlie Stayt and Naga Munchetty present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: Fraud Squad NHS
programme.desc: Investigators uncover a scandalous abuse of public money when an NHS manager cooks up a plot to steal £250,000 - money meant to pay for dialysis equipment for patients(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: The presenters follow the development of properties in Dalton-Le-Dale in County Durham, Irlam in Manchester and Plumstead in London(n)

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: Krystyn Onaivi wants to give her children the sunshine lifestyle she loved as a child by moving to Australia. However, husband Joseph is more than happy with his life in the UK. A trial week in Perth is arranged to give the couple the chance to look at the homes, jobs and lifestyle on offer 'Down Under'. Whether the experience will unite or drive a wedge between the pair remains to be seen. Presented by Nicki Chapman(n)

programme.title: Defenders UK
programme.desc: The officers catch a fly-tipper who dumped tons of waste in the grounds of an Oldham school for children with learning difficulties, leaving the school with a £22,000 clean-up bill(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles presents the programme from the Royal Welsh Showground in Builth Wells, with antiques experts Caroline Hawley and Raj Bisram assisting the reds and blues(n)

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales(n)

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Ruhma deals with a new mother who is convinced her baby has been swapped. Al's views on protecting children online do not go down well with Zara(n)

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway - Private Investigators
programme.desc: A carpet magnate is killed in an accident at his warehouse, but his youngest daughter suspects foul play and hires Frank and Luella to investigate her own two sisters(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a married couple with a £500,000 budget find a romantic retirement home in the Dorset countryside. Nicki also meets members of the public committed to refurbishing the region's distinctive 'finger posts'(n)

programme.title: The Farmers' Country Showdown
programme.desc: Dairy farmer Tereza shows her prize goats and aspiring agricultural assessor Mark competes for recognition of his young Southdown flock at the Tendring Hundred Show(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Raj Bisram go antique shopping in Norfolk, where the items that take their fancy include an unusual gavel, a pair of polo horses and a vintage train set(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Matt Baker and Alex Jones present the live magazine show featuring a mixture of celebrity chat and stories of interest(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Linda struggles at the support session and breaks down afterwards - and soon enough, she is back on the bottle. Bernadette is curious about Karen's lack of concern when the police update her about Keanu, so she uses her mother's phone to leave a message for her brother. Sharon is taken aback by Dennis's bad attitude towards her, and Patrick, Sheree and Denise celebrate Isaac's new job at Walford High(n)

programme.title: Best Home Cook
programme.desc: The quarter-finalists prepare for another two challenges but first there's a surprise as, for one week only, Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge joins the judges in Angela Hartnett's place. Then it's down to business as Mary Berry asks them to cook their ultimate family pie and Chris Bavin challenges them to rustle up a dish using a root vegetable usually served on the side. As usual, those who least impress the judges compete in the eliminator, a recipe close to Tom's heart that he expects to be executed perfectly. Presented by Claudia Winkleman(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The celebratory launch of a new luxury resort is cut short when a woman is found electrocuted in her hotel bathtub - with the door locked from the inside. It looks like a simple case of suicide, but with Jack Mooney no longer around to confirm Commissioner Selwyn's suspicions, DI Neville Parker is temporarily flown over from Manchester to close the case. However, he soon realises that island life is not for him, so when evidence of suspicious activity turns up, he is dismayed to realise he will have to extend his stay and investigate the case as murder. Ralf Little joins the cast, with guest appearances by Steve Pemberton and Samantha Bond(n)

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the topical debate from Harpenden, St Albans, inviting the studio audience to question a panel of politicians and other guests on subjects that have made the headlines over the past week(n)

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: The name may have changed but it's business as usual as the Brexitcast team - Laura Kuennsberg, Chris Mason, Katya Adler and Adam Fleming - deliver their usual mix of light-hearted gossip and serious analysis about the latest political goings-on(n)

programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Matt Baker and Alex Jones present the live magazine show featuring a mixture of celebrity chat and stories of interest(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Linda struggles at the support session and breaks down afterwards - and soon enough, she is back on the bottle. Bernadette is curious about Karen's lack of concern when the police update her about Keanu, so she uses her mother's phone to leave a message for her brother. Sharon is taken aback by Dennis's bad attitude towards her, and Patrick, Sheree and Denise celebrate Isaac's new job at Walford High(n)

programme.title: Best Home Cook
programme.desc: The quarter-finalists prepare for another two challenges but first there's a surprise as, for one week only, Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge joins the judges in Angela Hartnett's place. Then it's down to business as Mary Berry asks them to cook their ultimate family pie and Chris Bavin challenges them to rustle up a dish using a root vegetable usually served on the side. As usual, those who least impress the judges compete in the eliminator, a recipe close to Tom's heart that he expects to be executed perfectly. Presented by Claudia Winkleman(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The celebratory launch of a new luxury resort is cut short when a woman is found electrocuted in her hotel bathtub - with the door locked from the inside. It looks like a simple case of suicide, but with Jack Mooney no longer around to confirm Commissioner Selwyn's suspicions, DI Neville Parker is temporarily flown over from Manchester to close the case. However, he soon realises that island life is not for him, so when evidence of suspicious activity turns up, he is dismayed to realise he will have to extend his stay and investigate the case as murder. Ralf Little joins the cast, with guest appearances by Steve Pemberton and Samantha Bond(n)

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the topical debate from Harpenden, St Albans, inviting the studio audience to question a panel of politicians and other guests on subjects that have made the headlines over the past week(n)

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: The name may have changed but it's business as usual as the Brexitcast team - Laura Kuennsberg, Chris Mason, Katya Adler and Adam Fleming - deliver their usual mix of light-hearted gossip and serious analysis about the latest political goings-on(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Dan Walker and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: Fraud Squad NHS
programme.desc: An audacious scam robs NHS hospitals of more than £12.5million and a hospital cashier leads the high life, taking money meant for patients and putting it into her own bank account(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell, Martin Roberts and Dion Dublin meet property developers who tell their stories of refurbishment projects in Darwen, Lancashire, Bolton and Levenshulme(n)

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: Rebecca, who previously lived in Australia, and her wife Rachel decide to spend a trial week living in down under to see if they should make the move there permanently(n)

programme.title: Defenders UK
programme.desc: A learner driver tries to cheat his way through his driving test using a Bluetooth device, while a wealthy businessman sells unlicensed medicines that he claims can cure cancer(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles and experts Jonathan Pratt and Danny Sebastian travel to Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire for the buying and selling contest. Two married couples go head to head to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, and they all have their sights set on a golden gavel. Eric also visits the small village of Eyam to discover how, 350 years ago, the villagers made a daring decision to quarantine themselves, and stop the spread of the plague(n)

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland(n)

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Al tries to cure Bear of his fear of blood, as Daniel and Zara continue to work through their troubled past. On a drug raid, Rob bumps into two familiar faces(n)

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway - Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu take on the case of a washed-up rock star who believes that the Devil is trying to kill him, and set out to unmask the real culprit(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a couple from Worcestershire to find a home in Cornwall, and discovers a project that prescribes the therapeutic benefits of nature to improve well-being(n)

programme.title: The Farmers' Country Showdown
programme.desc: Sheep farmers Ian and Fiona compete against the Wills family, who run a mixed farm and exhibit pigs, at the Yeovil Show(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Raj Bisram look for bargains in East Anglia, as well as having a go at step dancing and discovering an 18th-century collection of self-playing instruments(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Matt Baker present another mix of nationwide reports and live studio-based chat(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Whitney is racked with guilt about Kush and plans to put things right, despite Tiffany urging her not to do anything that puts her in danger. Shirley is determined to make Linda face her problems and pleads with Mick to take his wife to an addict support session at the community centre. Ash and her brothers are surprised by Suki's reaction to Iqra, Sheree opens up to Patrick about Isaac, and Sharon makes a peace offering to Dennis(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day Live: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Oxford United v Newcastle United (Kick-off 8.05pm). Coverage of the fourth-round replay, which comes from Kassam Stadium, as the teams contest the right to face West Bromwich Albion at The Hawthorns in the next round. The match at St James' Park ended 0-0, with Newcastle forward Joelinton having two goals disallowed for offside, and League One Oxford will now feel they have an excellent chance of producing an upset against their Premier League opponents(n)

programme.title: The Search
programme.desc: When a woman in her 80s vanishes near Newtonabbey, Community Rescue Service is called to the scene. Meanwhile in Belfast, teams search for missing man in his 20s, and volunteers are called out to help a distressed man under a bridge(n)

programme.title: Plastic Surgery Undressed
programme.desc: Vogue Williams and Mobeen Azhar explain the ins and outs of liposuction, and offer four people considering the procedure a sneak preview of exactly what it entails, by watching a surgeon operate on a sportsman whose physique has suffered following an injury. The very different experiences of two women who have undergone liposuction brings the risks and rewards of the process to light(n)

programme.title: Easy Ways to Live Well
programme.desc: Hugh Fearnley-Whittingstall and Steph McGovern challenge staff at a garden centre in the Wirral to test remedies for their aches and pains. The pair also tackle their own health concerns, including Steph's apprehension at exercising while pregnant and Hugh's worry that he's starting to lose his mental sharpness. Hugh then meets a family in Devon struggling with a very common ailment - fussy eating. With mealtimes a battlefield, he wants to discover if a counterintuitive idea may finally bring peace to the dinner table(n)

programme.desc: Dan Walker and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: Fraud Squad NHS
programme.desc: Investigators are on the case of a locksmith who conned a London hospital out of almost half a million pounds by over-charging for supplies(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and the team explore properties about to be auctioned in Crewe, Cheshire, Blackwell in the West Midlands, and Poplar in east London(n)

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: Anna Larkin thinks Australia will offer her son the perfect lifestyle, but husband Aaron is moving nowhere until they have spent a trial week in Brisbane. With Nicki Chapman(n)

programme.title: Defenders UK
programme.desc: The team catch up with a second-hand car dealer who sold a potentially deadly vehicle, and track down a fish merchant who has been illegally harvesting shellfish(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Caroline Hawley help two teams look for items at Newark Antiques Fair in Nottinghamshire, before seeing if they make profits at auction. Anita Manning presents(n)

programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland(n)

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Medical drama series set in a busy Midlands surgery. Daniel attends a restaurant run by prison inmates and has to help chaplain Cathy overcome her crisis of faith.(n)

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway - Private Investigators
programme.desc: Long-buried secrets are unearthed when Frank and Lu come to the aid of a community of allotment holders who are being threatened with eviction(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman heads to Cornwall on a property search with a couple who have £750,000 to realise their dream of starting their married life together near the Cornish coast. While in the area, Nicki visits Looe Harbour to learn about the importance of sustainable fishing methods, which is championed by the local fishmongers she meets(n)

programme.title: The Farmers' Country Showdown
programme.desc: Flower farmer Shelley Sishton and sweet pea grower Darren Everest compete at the Kent County Show. Their displays are bespoke and spectacular as they go all out for a gold card(n)

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Sacha prepares to perform a groundbreaking bowel transplant operation, but Max fears he is the wrong man for the job, given his recent bereavement and past struggles with mental health. Nicky is struggling to keep her debts under control, only to be confronted with her mother as a patient, who reveals that she now owes even more money. Donna encounters a casting director, and tries to get herself on his books(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jack is rushed to hospital after collapsing at the scene of a car crash, which Thomas suspects could be the result of exposure to the same nerve agent that was used on John Sealy. With Jack's life hanging in the balance, it falls to Nikki, Thomas and Clarissa to find the truth and save their friend(n)

programme.desc: Stephen Nolan probes the issues that matter to the people of Northern Ireland, focusing on the stories of the week and the people making the headlines in lively debates with the studio audience and guest panellists(n)

programme.title: Eating with My Ex
programme.desc: Ayo is desperate to find out why his first love Felicia broke up with him out of the blue, and Michael and Casey wonder if they will ever be able to trust each other again(n)

programme.title: My Mate's a Bad Date
programme.desc: Self-confessed serial dater Tyler wants to find the male version of herself, so Oloni puts that idea to the test as he sets her up on three challenging dates(n)

programme.title: First & Last
programme.desc: Game show where contestants have to make sure they do not come first or last in any game or they will be eliminated. programme.desc: Olympic swimming silver medallist Siobhan-Marie O'Connor, England cricketer Jake Ball, Great Britain Fed Cup tennis captain Anne Keothavong and former Wales prop Adam Jones join team captains Matt Dawson and Phil Tufnell and host Sue Barker on the quiz(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: The Metro: A Rail Life Story
programme.desc: A train breaks down in a tunnel near the Metro's busiest station, drawing attention to the fact that many of the vehicles in the Metro fleet are past their best. Track inspection supervisor Wayne has his work cut out repairing decaying sleepers which, if not quickly replaced, could cause a train derailment, and customer service manager Alan finds his quiet night in rudely interrupted when he is called into work to deal with an outbreak of anti-social behaviour(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Midsomer Museum of the Family is packed with visitors to see a collection of miniature dolls houses donated by a real estate mogul - only for the businessman to be shot dead in front of the crowd. Barnaby's investigation uncovers evidence of unsafe living conditions for the victim's tenants that would have given plenty of people a reason to kill - as well as a mysterious death that a man was imprisoned for, despite protesting his innocence. Guest starring Joanna Page, Katy Brand and Eleanor Bron(n)

programme.desc: The funerals approach, and without the answers he needs and still more questions being thrown up from White House Farm, Stan's efforts remain fruitless. programme.desc: Bradley is on the mend following his rodeo injury and determined to get back behind the wheel of the RV. programme.title: Tonight
programme.desc: With more than 3.6 million people now vaping in the UK, reporter Jonathan Maitland explores the boom in the industry, while undercover reporters find out what is in the liquid people are smoking. Industry bosses claim vaping is a safer, cleaner, healthier alternative to smoking. But are there any health risks?(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Arthur has some explaining to do, Victoria overhears something that excites her, and Pete makes a decision about his future(n)

programme.title: Save Money: Lose Weight
programme.desc: Volunteers test two more diets - Eat Yourself Healthy, the latest spin on gut health, and The Complete Pegan Diet for Beginners, a new catchphrase combining paleo and vegan approaches. How will they rank on the leaderboard? Ranj Singh looks at the return of fibre, finding out whether it is worth jumping on the bandwagon, and Sian Williams look at the latest veg boxes on the market which use mis-shapen produce before it ends up as waste(n)

programme.title: Inside the Crown: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The documentary explores how the Queen has responded in times of sadness and grief, as she faced personal tragedies and national disasters including the Aberfan disaster, the Grenfell fire, and the IRA's murder of Lord Mountbatten. The Queen also faced her so-called 'Annus Horribilis' in 1992, when family scandal, press ridicule and the catastrophic Windsor Castle fire tested her skills as monarch and mother to the limit, and, of course the death of Diana, Princess of Wales, when her slow response to the nation's grief threatened to destabilise the monarchy(n)

programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents(n)

programme.title: The Late Debate

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: When a young man is found dead and stark naked out on the Fens, Will and Geordie discover ties to a Cambridge research project experimenting with mind-altering drugs. Its arrogant professor is a proponent of the drug LSD in his psychotherapy sessions, but Will and Geordie start wondering whether there is more going on. As the case proceeds, Will's feelings of guilt about his father's death and his conflicted feelings about Ellie start to take their toll. Elsewhere, the Keatings suffer an awkward dinner party and the Chapman feud shows no sign of relenting. Robson Green and Tom Brittney star(n)

programme.title: Inside the Crown: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The documentary explores how the Queen has responded in times of sadness and grief, as she faced personal tragedies and national disasters including the Aberfan disaster, the Grenfell fire, and the IRA's murder of Lord Mountbatten. The Queen also faced her so-called 'Annus Horribilis' in 1992, when family scandal, press ridicule and the catastrophic Windsor Castle fire tested her skills as monarch and mother to the limit, and, of course the death of Diana, Princess of Wales, when her slow response to the nation's grief threatened to destabilise the monarchy(n)

Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox(n)

programme.desc: Paul meets Cavalier King Charles spaniels Lady and Gemma, elderly sisters who have spent their lives in each other's company. It is hoped they will find a new home together - but then things take a turn for the worse when the vets realise they also need surgery on their ears. Will they get the retirement they deserve? Also arriving is emaciated mongrel Hector, who is desperately underweight, while Paul tries to cheer up Alaskan malamute Baloo, the home's longest-serving resident, by giving the depressed dog a change of scene(n)

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present a special edition of the series, dedicated to the worldwide search for the remains of soldiers killed during the First World War with no known graves. programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Return of the detective drama starring Bradley Walsh. Ronnie and new partner Joe lead the investigation into the death of jeweller Harry Bernstein, who has been found with his hands and teeth missing. His wife, her lover and a former business associate are all possible suspects, but the case takes a surprising turn when the victim's sister receives a gruesome delivery. She's on the jury for the trial of a drug dealer and murderer who Ronnie has been trying to nail for years, and the threat to her points to jury tampering, so Jake and Kate have to take a dramatic approach to win the case. programme.desc: Debbie Bellamy goes on a late-night drinking spree by the river, but her actions get her into trouble when evidence ties her to the spot where a body is fished out of the water. Rob and Helen try to patch up their relationship, while Peggy and David are appalled to find a hippie encampment in the back yard - until they realise there's money to be made. Rural drama, with Josefina Gabrielle(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: David Suchet takes on his final case as the Belgian sleuth in the last-ever episode of the long-running drama. Crippled with arthritis, Poirot is now using a wheelchair and has a life-threatening heart condition, but remains as sharp as ever. Calling on old friend Captain Hastings for assistance, he returns to Styles, where the pair first met 30 years earlier on a murder investigation. The detective is convinced the country house is once again harbouring a killer, and as guests fall victim to a mysterious attacker, he must summon the last of his strength to battle his ultimate nemesis. With Hugh Fraser, Anne Reid, Philip Glenister, Helen Baxendale, Matthew McNulty, Anna Madeley and Shaun Dingwall(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: While investigating the fatal stabbing of a psychiatrist with a caseload of violent adolescent patients, Ronnie and Joe's first instinct is to question those he was treating. However, the case takes a disturbing turn when the detectives discover a hidden sleeping compartment in the victim's office which has clearly been used recently by one of his underage visitors - and evidence comes to light suggesting he may have been having an affair with one of them. Drama, starring Bradley Walsh and Ben Bailey Smith, with Ramon Tikaram and Hattie Morahan(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A highly respected scientist is murdered just before he is about to deliver a controversial lecture on the environment. It becomes clear he had many enemies within the profession, but Morse's investigations lead him to a killer who is altogether closer to home. Mystery, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Geoffrey Palmer, Cheryl Campbell and George Costigan(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Called to investigate the murder of a brewery manager, Morse delves into the history of the generations-old family firm and discovers that several employees and shareholders stood to profit from the victim's death. programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken is horrified when Tracy announces she is leaving Weatherfield and going to live in London. Bet receives a postcard from Hamburg, and Vicky returns to school(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis enters her still life picture in the art class exhibition, and is flattered by Roger's portrait of her. Mike and Steve settle the deal with the band manager(n)

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: With the house guests getting ever more rowdy, Louisa worries about the villa's reputation, but Spiros's increasing presence at the villa continues to delight her. Margo finds a surprising way to bond with Maud, while Gerry realises he has feelings for Galini.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Miller's old Army captain shows up to make him a business proposition, which he turns down without regret. However, when Walker and Bellamy are called to investigate a vehicle theft, it becomes clear the sergeant's old friend has other matters to take care of in Aidensfield. Meanwhile, Gina is reluctant to let Jack paint her in the nude. Rural Sixties drama, with John Duttine and Jonathan Kerrigan(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: An American female bishop visiting St Gerard's College is found dead after drinking poisoned wine, and when another two killings occur, both mirroring macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, it appears the culprit is targeting candidates in the election to become vice-regent. However, when Innocent learns one of the suspects is hiding a dark secret, Lewis and Hathaway realise the motive is much more twisted. Guest starring Sian Phillips and Ronald Pickup, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: While working with the drug squad, Ronnie and Joe find a skeleton that has been hidden inside the boot of a car in the River Thames. It turns out to be the remains of Taylor Kane, an undercover policeman who went missing in the 1980s - around the time of the Brixton riots. Through clever detection, unsettling evidence is unearthed and the team knows it must raise issues the police would rather forget. Drama, starring Bradley Walsh and Ben Bailey Smith, and featuring one of the last performances by Roger Lloyd-Pack, who died in January(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Called to investigate the murder of a brewery manager, Morse delves into the history of the generations-old family firm and discovers that several employees and shareholders stood to profit from the victim's death. The challenge facing him is to discern whether any of them would stoop to foul play. Guest starring Lionel Jeffries and John Bird(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Andy and Curly agree to be friends again, Bet is pleased when Raquel returns to work behind the bar. Tracy tells Deirdre she is disgusted by her and her toy boy(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Deirdre tells Tracy about Denise being pregnant. Charlie makes plans to leave Weatherfield, but Tanya persuades him to face Bet and tell the truth about their affair(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim asserts herself over the Home Farm staff at the bike rally. Turner is appalled at the state of the Woolpack's books. Luke confronts the Dingle family once again(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris fails to rekindle the romance in his marriage. Betty discovers the full extent of Pollard's deception. At Emmerdale, the Beast of Beckindale strikes again(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Local farmer Colin Judd is devastated when he is forced to place his property in the hands of an auctioneer following the death of his father - but is even more shocked to see his estranged brother at the sale. Debbie Bellamy finds herself in trouble for drink-driving, and David has difficulty with a stubborn pony meant to be pulling a trap full of tourists. Rural drama, with David Lonsdale(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby imagines he is rich after being left a sizeable sum in his uncle's will. But there is a condition attached - and the landlord has to seek Miss Jones's help if he has any hope of seeing the money. Andrew Sachs guest stars, with Leonard Rossiter and Frances de la Tour(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: In a bid to find true love, Rigsby puts a personal advertisement in the local paper and receives an unexpected reply. Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington star(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Jo are entranced when they meet Robin's older brother. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A diary and a parking ticket are found at a murder scene in a multi-storey car park. It is not much to go on, but Morse soon links the clues to a crime of passion involving a jealous husband, his wife and her lover. On the personal front, the Oxford detective's feathers are ruffled by a woman he finds himself attracted to. John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Mel Martin and Amanda Hillwood star(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bernie becomes the target of a series of mysterious and violent attacks, while Peggy is forced to intervene after David finds he can't match the other contestants in an angling competition. Helen is horrified by the arrival of her estranged father in Aidensfield - but he has a bombshell to drop that causes her to rethink their relationship. Rural drama, starring Peter Benson and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dave Glover's job is at stake as a poacher decimates the game farm. Rachel and Chris find themselves growing closer. Zoe puts Kim in her place(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is worried by Sarah's strange behaviour. Luke and Jessica make plans for their parents' absence. Dave Glover finds another reason to chat to Kathy(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bet cannot face letting the punters know the truth about Charlie. Mike offers Kevin work chauffeuring, and Don tells Nick he has to go home to the Platts as he is working nights(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Platts celebrate their third anniversary, and Ken feels he has let Tracy down, but she refuses to talk to him. Steve plans a flat-warming party(n)

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: An encounter with Daphne leaves Leslie pondering the possibility of fatherhood. He offers to look after her baby for a day, only to find himself having to organise a hunting expedition for one of the guests. With an unfortunate shortage of wildlife to hand, he persuades basil to pretend to be a wild boar. Gerry is opposed to killing animals for sport, so he and Galini hatch a plan to sabotage the hunt. Margo moves in with Theo, and Louisa is on the receiving end of some slightly confused romantic advances(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bernie becomes the target of a series of mysterious and violent attacks, while Peggy is forced to intervene after David finds he can't match the other contestants in an angling competition. Helen is horrified by the arrival of her estranged father in Aidensfield - but he has a bombshell to drop that causes her to rethink their relationship. Rural drama, starring Peter Benson and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox(n)

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul meets Cavalier King Charles spaniels Lady and Gemma, elderly sisters who have spent their lives in each other's company. It is hoped they will find a new home together - but then things take a turn for the worse when the vets realise they also need surgery on their ears. Will they get the retirement they deserve? Also arriving is emaciated mongrel Hector, who is desperately underweight, while Paul tries to cheer up Alaskan malamute Baloo, the home's longest-serving resident, by giving the depressed dog a change of scene(n)

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present a special edition of the series, dedicated to the worldwide search for the remains of soldiers killed during the First World War with no known graves. The programme follows the work of an elite all-female team at the Ministry of Defence known as the 'War Detectives', whose job is to locate the final resting places of 500,000 service personnel who lost their lives during the conflict(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Return of the detective drama starring Bradley Walsh. Ronnie and new partner Joe lead the investigation into the death of jeweller Harry Bernstein, who has been found with his hands and teeth missing. His wife, her lover and a former business associate are all possible suspects, but the case takes a surprising turn when the victim's sister receives a gruesome delivery. She's on the jury for the trial of a drug dealer and murderer who Ronnie has been trying to nail for years, and the threat to her points to jury tampering, so Jake and Kate have to take a dramatic approach to win the case. The problem is, they're up against a formidable defence barrister. Co-starring Ben Bailey Smith, Dominic Rowan and Georgia Taylor, with guests Helen Baxendale and Christopher Fulford(n)

programme.desc: The Daleys move into the high-spending world of corporate hospitality and find themselves caught between glamour and danger. Samantha Womack guest stars, alongside George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents coverage of the afternoon session on day two of the first of three tournaments in the Coral Series, held at The Centaur in Cheltenham, featuring first-round matches played over the best of seven frames. programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to reinvestigate the tigerfish - a pack-hunting carnivore previously blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. If these fish are as lethal as Jeremy concluded, then why aren't there more reports of fatal, piranha-like attacks? In a bid to flush out the true nature of these sight-hunting predators, Jeremy puts on his dive gear and offers himself as live bait(n)

programme.title: Snooker: World Grand Prix
programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents coverage of the evening session on day two of the first of three tournaments in the Coral Series, held at The Centaur in Cheltenham, featuring first-round matches played over the best of seven frames. Ronnie O'Sullivan won this title in 2018, but his title-defence came to an early end at this stage last year when he was beaten 4-2 by Marco Fu. With analysis from Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus and Neal Foulds, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

programme.title: Sudden Death (1995)
programme.desc: Terrorists seize control of an ice-hockey stadium in the middle of a match attended by the US vice president. Taking the politician hostage, they threaten to blow up the building at the final whistle - but a resourceful former fireman takes it upon himself to thwart their dastardly plot. Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Powers Boothe, Raymond J Barry and Whittni Wright(n)

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A man wrecks a jewellery store and puts a security guard in hospital. Murtaugh delves deep into the psyche of the suspect, a former Navy Seal once treated for post traumatic stress disorder, and draws parallels between him and his partner Riggs, who also once served in the military. Although Riggs' association with the suspect threatens to interfere with the case, it also forces him to open up to his colleague about the experiences that have shaped him. Clayne Crawford, Damon Wayans and Dante Brown star(n)

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The Baker Street sleuth is summoned to the Lake District to investigate the mysterious disappearance of an enigmatic woman. Period detective drama, guest starring Michael Jayston and Cheryl Campbell with Jeremy Brett(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's brother-in-law Brian suffers a bout of depression, affecting everyone on the manor, and leading the dodgy dealer to make some dubious deals including giving one punter a £500 discount. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter(n)

programme.title: Snooker: World Grand Prix
programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents coverage of the afternoon session on day three of the first of three tournaments in the Coral Series, held at The Centaur in Cheltenham, featuring first-round matches played over the best of seven frames. With analysis from Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus and Neal Foulds, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A ministerial secretary innocently leaks information regarding a secret peace talks meeting to her lover, leading to a shooting incident and placing the future of the summit in jeopardy. While her boyfriend's involvement remains in doubt, Cowley gets her to pass on false information in the hope it will prove his innocence or confirm his guilt. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the mysterious deaths of fishermen in Alaska. A recent fatal incident sends him on a search for possible suspects - first through treacherous rapids, then down to the river-mouth where the icy waters are swarming with sharks. Yet it's an unexpected beast, hauled up from the depths, that eventually emerges as his deadliest contender(n)

programme.title: Snooker: World Grand Prix
programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents coverage of the evening session on day three of the first of three tournaments in the Coral Series, held at The Centaur in Cheltenham, featuring second-round matches played over the best of seven frames. Top seed Mark Allen lost 4-1 to eventual runner-up Ali Carter at this stage last year, and his quarter-final opponent was confirmed as David Gilbert, who prevailed 4-0 against Ding Junhui. Fellow Chinese players Xiao Guodong and Yuan Sijun also made it through to the last eight, defeating Mark Davis and Stephen Maguire respectively, while Judd Trump beat compatriot Tom Ford to set up a mouth-watering clash against Mark Selby. With analysis from Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus and Neal Foulds, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds (2009)
programme.desc: American officer Aldo Raine leads a squad of soldiers into occupied France on a mission to kill as many Nazis as possible and spread fear through the Third Reich. They become involved in a Jewish resistance fighter's plan to blow up the premiere of a propaganda movie - due to be attended by Hitler himself. Quentin Tarantino's wartime adventure, with Brad Pitt, Melanie Laurent, Diane Kruger, Michael Fassbender and an Oscar-winning Christoph Waltz(n)

As staffing shortages impact mental health services, personnel often find themselves forced to determine what the least harmful option for their patients is. Among the cases they are struggling to keep safe are a man with schizophrenia, depression, acute anxiety and psychogenic seizures who no longer qualifies for the support he relies on, and a woman with a personality disorder who has attempted suicide 15 times in the last three years(n)

programme.title: Australia on Fire: Climate Emergency

Reporter Kylie Morris examines the long-term impact of the fires on the diverse animal population and ecology, with drone footage revealing the extent of the devastation, while the programme also features testimony from those who only just escaped their burning homes with their lives, as well as hearing from some of those who have returned to burnt-out properties(n)

programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the final crucial stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain(n)

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Rufus Jones' comedy series about Syrian asylum-seeker Sami returns. Eight months after arriving in the UK, Sami still awaits the right for him to remain in the country. While everything is in limbo, all Sami can do is make himself useful to his hosts: Katy, Peter and John in Dorking, but his good-humoured patience it starting to wear thin, and a family day out leads to frustration for all(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on Northamptonshire police's tackling of hate crime, following PCs Lauren El Sharkawi and Nina Crehan after they investigate a call from a family in Northampton who have been subjected to racist abuse from a neighbour. The police are also experiencing a surge in homophobic and transphobic abuse and are called to deal with one incident where the victim being targeted is just 13(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors investigate the underlying medical conditions that may have caused a motorist to crash into a lamppost, while the patient's son and his friend recount the influence she has had on both their lives. A man who fell during the night is treated for possible head trauma, and the father of a three-year-old patient reveals how his stepfather inspired him to be the best parent he can be(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Basset hound Barney is 'top dog' at home, enjoying salmon and venison as some of his favourite treats. But lately Barney's vertebrae have been causing him problems and Noel Fitzpatrick needs to perform high-risk surgery using 3D-printed implants. The professor also treats a giant mastiff called Tank, who is suffering from severe arthritis and needs radical surgery on both elbows, and a family puppy who has fractured his foot jumping off a bed. Now he requires specially developed surgical treatment(n)

programme.desc: The dinner-party challenge heads to Ayrshire, where castle-dwelling former TV producer Patrick Dromgoole competes with performance poet Duffy, weight-watcher Jolyn Dewson and obsessive cook Ann Hay for the £1,000 prize. The week's highlights include a grace in Latin, a foraging expedition and dogs dressed as butlers(n)

programme.title: The Great Hotel Escape

programme.desc: Documentary following the animals of the epic wilderness through the four seasons. The story begins in autumn, which sees a miraculous transformation as the forests turn from vibrant green to gold and red - but as the days grow shorter and colder, many of Canada's animals are in a race against time to make what they can of the remaining food. Black bears fatten up and prepare for hibernation, birds fly south and beavers daub the walls of their lodge with mud for extra insulation(n)

Dan reveals how his childhood inspired his unusual lifestyle, and takes Ben on a journey deep into the surrounding mountain ranges. Finding food is one of the biggest challenges facing a male porcupine as every day he leaves the safety of his den to forage in the forests of Quebec. For a family of beavers, ice is the enemy, as their frozen pond leaves them with no protection from land predators on the surface. Meanwhile, a female polar bear leads her newborn offspring on a treacherous journey to find food(n)

programme.desc: On the final leg of the American adventure, a telephone call from the UK heralds major changes for the team. Red 2 pilot Damo has to rush home from Vancouver for the unexpected early arrival of his first child. The remaining eight head south to Miramar, and the largest military airshow in the US, where they share top billing with the US Navy's elite aerobatic team, the Blue Angels. Later, there's an iconic flypast over the Golden Gate Bridge and the Great Pacific Airshow, before an epic and challenging journey home(n)

programme.title: Canada: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Documentary following the wildlife of Canada throughout spring, when the race is on to find a mate and start a family. For a black bear in the west, that process has already begun as she emerges from her forest den with a tiny cub. Now she must teach him to survive. A wood frog who has spent the entire winter frozen takes his first breath of the year as the ice melts around him, and 20,000 gannets fly 300 miles from the Gulf of Mexico to breed on the same 300ft tower of sandstone(n)

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: A crown green bowling team in Saydo are determined to end their losing streak, while Joe and Jan receive some devastating news concerning the future of the dog shelter. A Peterborough man who relocated to the Costa Del Sol launches his mobile cocktail bar, and a former racehorse that has been repeatedly rehomed and returned to the rescue centre may finally have found the right owner(n)

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: An insight into the working life of officers patrolling the nation's roads, using modern technology and old-fashioned methods to bring criminals to justice(n)

programme.title: Creed (2015)
programme.desc: The son of a heavyweight boxer who died in the ring seeks to follow in the footsteps of the father he never knew. He goes in search of his father's old rival-turned-best friend Rocky Balboa, who agrees to train the young fighter for a shot at the title - but the ageing champ is facing challenges of his own. Boxing drama, starring Michael B Jordan, with Sylvester Stallone reprising his role from the Rocky movies(n)

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston(n)

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.(n)

programme.title: D-Day the Sixth of June (1956)
programme.desc: A British colonel and an American captain board a ship heading out on a dangerous mission as part of the Normandy Landings. As the two men prepare for the battle to come, they both reminisce about their love for the same woman. Second World War drama, starring Robert Taylor, Richard Todd, Dana Wynter and Edmond O'Brien(n)

programme.title: Warlock (1959)
programme.desc: A ruthless vigilante is recruited as a sheriff to clean up the streets of a crime-ridden town, but his strong-arm tactics soon antagonise the townsfolk. When a woman turns up and accuses the lawman of murdering her fiance, the residents rally to her cause with the help of a rival gunslinger. Western, starring Henry Fonda, Richard Widmark, Anthony Quinn, DeForest Kelley and Dorothy Malone(n)

programme.title: Risen (2016)
programme.desc: A Roman officer and his assistant are charged with investigating what became of Jesus' body following the crucifixion, as the Roman hierarchy fears stories of a resurrected Messiah may lead to an uprising in Jerusalem. However, what they discover during their search forces them to question everything they believe. Biblical drama, starring Joseph Fiennes and Tom Felton(n)

programme.title: Taken 3 (2014)
programme.desc: In the final part of the blockbusting big-screen trilogy, ex-CIA agent Bryan Mills' efforts to finally live a quiet life are shattered by the death of his ex-wife, Lenore. Just when things seemingly can't get any worse, he is framed for her murder and must fight to clear his name. Taken 2 director Olivier Megaton returns for this action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Forest Whitaker, Maggie Grace and Dougray Scott(n)

A British soldier deployed to Belfast in 1971, almost immediately finds himself caught up in a riot. In the aftermath, he becomes separated from the rest of his unit. Lost and alone at night in a hostile and unfamiliar area, he makes a disturbing journey in search of safety. Thriller, starring Jack O'Connell and Richard Dormer(n)

programme.title: Byzantium (2012)
programme.desc: Two female vampires spend centuries on the run from an order of their own kind, who object to women becoming undead. They hide out in a seaside town, where one uses a brothel as a means to find men to feed on, while the other forms a bond with a terminally ill boy - but their past soon catches up with them. Horror, starring Gemma Arterton, Saoirse Ronan and Jonny Lee Miller(n)

programme.title: Esther Waters (1948)
programme.desc: A kitchen maid succumbs to the advances of a caddish stable lad and falls pregnant - but is abandoned for another woman. Period drama, starring Dirk Bogarde and Kathleen Ryan(n)

programme.title: The Violent Men (1955)
programme.desc: A ruthless cattle baron sets out to create his own private empire, no matter what the cost. When he resorts to murder, he makes an enemy of a civil war veteran, while his lust for power drives his wife into the arms of his younger brother. Western, starring Edward G Robinson, Barbara Stanwyck and Glenn Ford(n)

programme.title: The Weaker Sex (1948)
programme.desc: A housewife regrets not doing more to help the war effort after the ship her son is serving on is damaged in the D-Day Landings. Drama, starring Ursula Jeans and Thora Hird(n)

Western, starring Audie Murphy, Michael Burns, Laraine Stephens, Kenneth Tobey and Michael Keep(n)

programme.title: Last Vegas (2013)
programme.desc: A sixtysomething confirmed bachelor finally decides to settle down with his much younger girlfriend. Comedy, starring Michael Douglas, Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman and Kevin Kline(n)

programme.title: Wind River (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran hunter helps an FBI agent investigate the murder of a young woman on a Wyoming Native American reservation. Taylor Sheridan's crime drama, starring Jeremy Renner and Elizabeth Olsen(n)

programme.title: Lone Survivor (2013)

They soon find themselves faced with a terrible moral dilemma and a battle for survival against overwhelming odds. Fact-based drama, starring Mark Wahlberg, Taylor Kitsch, Emile Hirsch and Ben Foster(n)

programme.title: Rush (2013)

Fact-based drama, starring Chris Hemsworth, Daniel Bruhl and Olivia Wilde(n)

programme.title: 7th Cavalry (1956)
programme.desc: An army officer is branded a coward for failing to fight in the Battle of the Little Bighorn, and is unable to convince anyone that official business had detained him. In a bid to repair his damaged reputation, he leads a cavalry detail to retrieve the dead from the battlefield. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Jay C Flippen and Jeanette Nolan(n)

programme.title: Samson and Delilah (1949)
programme.desc: Hebrew warrior Samson becomes a wanted man after crossing paths with Philistine troops, but he constantly thwarts their efforts to capture him using to his incredible strength. Determined to bring him down, the Saran of Gaza makes use of his beguiling sister Delilah, who seduces Samson and manages to rob him of the source of his power. Cecil B DeMille's Oscar-winning adaptation of the biblical tale, starring Victor Mature, Hedy Lamarr, George Sanders, Angela Lansbury and Henry Wilcox(n)

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones(n)

programme.title: The 39 Steps (1959)
programme.desc: An innocent man becomes embroiled in international espionage as he tries to uncover the meaning behind the cryptic last words of a mystery woman, whom he knew for only a brief time before finding her dying in his flat. He must flee for his life from foreign spies and the police, who think he is a murderer. Spy thriller based on John Buchan's novel, starring Kenneth More, Taina Elg, Barry Jones and James Hayter(n)

programme.title: Max Steel (2016)

Family fantasy adventure, starring Ben Winchell, Maria Bello and Andy Garcia, with the voice of Josh Brener(n)

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard (2017)

Comedy action thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds, Samuel L Jackson, Gary Oldman and Salma Hayek(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

However, he ends up trying too hard to impress at breakfast the next day after Sandie De Rougemont reveals her past as a hotel inspector(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ex-hotel inspector Sandie De Rougemont, owner of the House of Agnes in Canterbury, plays host. She takes her guests to a local brewery and an upmarket restaurant, where everyone seems to enjoy themselves, but the revelation that a ghost may roam the rooms of the B&B leaves some of the participants nervous(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: It's mating season for Chester Zoo's onagers and after two years living alone, male Holmes is released into the female paddock, where he chases down every female in sight. Galapagos tortoise Charlie is losing weight and keepers believe that it's down to bullying from her older sister, so they decide to step in with an innovative system to try and alleviate the problem(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Andrew Winter and Neale Whitaker meet Darrel and his wife Karen, a couple in Australia who cannot decide whether to sell their home or renovate it(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head over to Denmark, where they embark on their first continental car rescue with a 1968 Volvo Amazon that has been in the same family for more than 45 years(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge visits Philip and Angelina and helps them build a bridge at their chateau - will Dick's design work? Jonathan and Michael test the services they provide at their chateau by inviting Michael's old college mates for the weekend, while Jonny and Ashley continue the search for their dream chateau(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The eight remaining potters are challenged to build a pair of matching lamp bases, hoping to impress judges Sue Pryke and Keith Brymer Jones. Later, guest judge Emma Bridgewater drops in to set an emotional ceramic challenge for the contestants. Presented by Melanie Sykes(n)

programme.title: The Billion Pound Hotel
programme.desc: Shaped like a giant sail and standing more than 1,000ft tall, the Burj Al Arab in Dubai cost an estimated £1billion to build, and has been dubbed the world's most luxurious hotel. Guests paying anything up to £10,000 a night expect only the highest of standards, so what does it take for the staff to satisfy these demanding customers? This programme follows the stories of a variety of visitors, from the King of Uganda to a firefighter who has saved up months of wages, and the workers who serve them(n)

programme.title: It Was Alright In
programme.desc: Matt Lucas narrates another look back at TV shows from past decades, with clips and reactions to programmes from people not around to watch them at the time. This edition focuses on 70s-style education, with a look at the lessons conveyed about society and sex, as well as lazy national stereotypes and the casual attitude of TV towards the health and safety of members of the public(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, as Jon Richardson and Michelle Wolf take on guest captain Jonathan Ross with Johnny Vegas. Three-man comedy act Pappy's joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The eight remaining potters are challenged to build a pair of matching lamp bases, hoping to impress judges Sue Pryke and Keith Brymer Jones. Later, guest judge Emma Bridgewater drops in to set an emotional ceramic challenge for the contestants. Presented by Melanie Sykes(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of investigations from the Food Unwrapped casebook. Kate Quilton visits a cattle farm in America with supersized cows to feed the huge demand for beef, Jimmy Doherty discovers why pine nuts are so expensive, and Matt Tebbutt learns why shop-bought pies tend not to spill out their gravy - revealing that the answer grows on trees(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Amber and Colin turn their bedroom into a dream vintage haven. After an initial assessment, the presenter begins by getting rid of any mass-produced furniture(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ben and Kelly Jukes have been saving up for a holiday home on the Costa Blanca since they got married five years ago. With their first baby on the way, they want somewhere where they can soak up the Spanish sun on holidays and that they can share with family and friends. Scarlette Douglas tempts them with five properties in and around Torrevieja for their budget of £55,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Angela Keenan and Jon Benbow-Brown have visited Menorca five times together, and have fallen in love with the laid-back way of life on the island. The pair are planning to retire there full-time, so Ben Hillman shows them five houses on the island for their budget of £165,000(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Andrew Winter and Neale Whitaker meet Kylie and Josh, whose Melbourne home does not meet their current requirements. But while she wants to move, he is keen to renovate(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores two quad bikes and a stylish sun lounger, while Simon O'Brien rescues a holed canoe and turns an old oak beam into a spice rack(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Essex, where Henry restores a car trailer and a 1970s racing bike, and Simon turns his attention to lovingly restoring a vintage model aircraft(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A quartet of B&B owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with luxury weight-loss and detox retreat Slimmeria in East Sussex. programme.title: Four in a Bed

However, the hosts hope an indulgent Cornish cream tea, a stick dance and a drink in their garden shed will succeed in winning over the guests(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Diane and Max Seivewright, the hosts at Ombersley B&B, feel betrayed by Ann and Bill Clay's feedback and want to know why they have been so harshly criticised, while Galia Grainger asks why Slimmeria's rules and regulations have provoked so much hostility(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo

Meanwhile, Keeper Isolde comes up with an unusual plan to give the zoo's three Komodo dragon sisters some much needed space from each other, and Chester's male lemurs are in for a shock with a female on her way to share their island(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia

programme.title: Grand Designs

The design for Toby's five-building home contains six bedrooms, six bathrooms, a music studio and an annexe - a vast project more like a village than a house. Creating this life changing vision on a £530k budget, and in only eight months, will not be an easy task, especially as they must build up close to an ancient oak without destroying any of the roots(n)
