Night two sees the turn of Kenny and his husband, Kenny, whose love of Mexico sees them trying to replicate authentic local food from their beloved country. Last to host are motormouth Ami and husband Stuart, who aim to impress with their well-presented Scottish food(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Courtland Gray, the COO of audio equipment manufacturer Peavey Electronics, is poised to take over the Mississippi-based company when his stepfather, founder and CEO Hartley Peavey, is ready to hand over the reins. As he prepares to take full responsibility for the firm, Courtland dons a disguise to go incognito among the staff and find out how the frontline employees really feel(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wonders how Ray would cope if she met an untimely end, and picks an attractive friend to replace her as his new wife - but cannot help being hurt by his enthusiastic response to the idea(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra throws a bridal shower for Amy, but Marie tries to take over and monopolises the event. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin is reunited with an old friend - and Niles and Frasier begin to suspect the pair may once have had an affair. However, the truth proves even more shocking. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne helps Frasier make up his mind whether he should sneak an on-air endorsement for a Chinese restaurant into his radio show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bettina and Eamon have spent nearly 30 years in military accommodation moving with Eamon's job. They are now ready to start the next chapter of their lives by buying the first property they will have bought together. They have chosen the Costa Calida in Spain and are hoping one of the five properties Danni Menzies has found within their £100,000 budget prove be perfect for them(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Gite owners in France face plumbing problems for their first guests, two caterers face a colossal cooking challenge, and a couple encounter problems in buying their dream home(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedic Rob Armstrong fights to save the life of a truck driver who is having a heart attack, while Paul Johnson and Alex Flashwood treat a woman they believe is having a stroke(n)

programme.title: Hidden Figures (2016)
programme.desc: A trio of African-American women attempt to overcome prejudice as they work on the US space programme. Fact-based drama, starring Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monae and Kevin Costner(n)

programme.title: Meet the Drug Lords: Inside the Real Narcos
programme.desc: Jason Fox travels to Peru to conclude his investigation into the South American drug cartels. He heads for a remote spot in the foothills of the Andes known as Cocaine Valley, where hundreds of tons of the drug are produced each year. Here he meets one of the valley's most renowned cocaine chefs, who works in a hidden, pop-up lab. The presenter also joins young drug carriers on a dangerous trek out of Cocaine Valley and accompanies an elite helicopter police unit on a raid to destroy a jungle lab(n)

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The 10 remaining recruits are sent on the run from a military-trained hunter force, and stalked across the punishing Scottish Highlands during the Escape and Evasion phase. Those who make it through will face the most psychologically demanding phase of selection, Interrogation, where they are captured and questioned by a specialist team of military interrogators. With limited sleep and rations, the final stages of selection are designed to grind down recruits(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: The pioneering vet treats a 10-year-old beagle unable to stand on its back legs, and when a scan reveals the canine has two diseased discs between three of its neck vertebrae, he operates to fuse the bones. He also fits a bionic knee in an 11-year-old labrador with bone cancer in its leg, and treats a bulldog puppy that has been run over by a car(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Pioneering veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick uses his talents to treat a puppy called Poppy, which has difficulties with walking, and a lurcher called Dylan needs help with a collapsed joint. The programme also features a one-year-old cat that was hit by a car on its first venture outside the house, leaving it requiring emergency treatment(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Thompson Hall Retreat in Norfolk, boasting stylish shepherd huts, and run by mother and daughter duo Amanda Benton and Becci Howlett(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Worcester, Lee Clarke competes against barber Terri Malone, company director Sean Tate and ex-dancer Josie Watson in the hope of securing the culinary contest's £1,000 prize. Terri prepares a rock-themed menu, Sean pins his hopes on an impressive but easy offering, and Josie formulates a menu that expresses her passion for glamour(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four dinner-party hosts battle to win a £1,000 cash prize in Kensington and Chelsea, west London. Posh estate agent Nick Le Ny-Clarke is keen to offer his guests a relaxing evening, while outspoken Nana Eshun manages to impress with her menu, and makes sure her opinions are heard when the conversation turns to politics. Eccentric Robbie Humphries gets everyone up dancing on his night, and flight attendant Louise Childs is put to the test as she struggles to serve her food on time(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Football fanatic Christian Wood competes against army wife Tina Watson, spiritualist Dean Foy and former holiday rep Lara Watson, as the dinner-party challenge heads to the Warwickshire town of Nuneaton. As well as the all-important dishes, the week's contest serves up the ashes of three dead cats, a host who appears to be scared of food, and a guest who commits the ultimate faux pas - spitting out food at the dinner table(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kim and Martin host first in East Anglia, with a Spanish menu, before Debbie and Richard and Jamie and Mark take their turns entertaining the others in the hope of winning £1,000(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Todd Pedersen, CEO and founder of Vivint, a leading solar and home security business, based in Utah, goes undercover among his own workforce posing as a contestant on a reality show. He's proud to head an organisation that provides a fun and relaxed work environment, but now that the company is offering smart home technology, it's in competition with much larger organisations, and Todd wants to make sure it's fully prepared to take them on(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that they're failing to save their father's Italian restaurant Levanti's from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Robert asks if he can borrow the suitcase sitting on the stairway landing, Ray explains he and Debra have been locked in a two-week battle of wills over who is responsible for putting the item away. Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie shame Ray into giving Robert a second bachelor party to make up for his disappointing first attempt(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bulldog overhears Frasier saying he is about to be sacked and quits his job at the radio station before the axe falls. Comedy, starring Dan Butler and Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The sudden death of Martin's seemingly healthy doctor gives Frasier an unpleasant reminder of his own mortality. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps childhood sweethearts Michelle and Fred find their dream holiday home on Gran Canaria. Michelle and Fred fell in love with the island after holidaying there over 20 years ago, and now the time is right to use their £190,000 budget to find somewhere where they can bring Michelle's mother and their three grandsons to enjoy too(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A catering couple from Bristol have a plumbing crisis in the face of a cooking deadline, while in France, two ex-pats deal with a major swimming pool leak(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first(n)

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman joins Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty for an evening of good food, great chat and celebrity fun and games. Jamie tracks down perfection from the man who originally invented the Strictly co-host family's favourite dish, butter chicken with fluffy pilau rice and naan bread, speaking to his grandson who is happy to share the original recipe. Jamie also creates a Spanish-inspired Southend paella for them all to tuck into, while Jimmy makes the perfect pork scratchings. The hosts also put a shift in at a fruit-packing plant and learn how to make gin with surplus grapes(n)

programme.title: Australia on Fire: Climate Emergency
programme.desc: The dramatic and terrifying story of the battle to save Australia from the bushfires ravaging the country, including first-hand accounts from firefighters on the front line. Reporter Kylie Morris examines the long-term impact of the fires on the diverse animal population and ecology, with drone footage revealing the extent of the devastation, while the programme also features testimony from those who only just escaped their burning homes with their lives, as well as hearing from some of those who have returned to burnt-out properties(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Miles Jupp and Sophie Duker join Sean Lock and Jon Richardson for the words-and-numbers game, while Stevenage builders Lee and Dean joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Cameras reveal what can go wrong when a dream holiday turns into a nightmare. Footage includes flight delays, hurricanes and worrying hotel rooms, all told by the people who were there. Psychologists and industry experts also reflect on the anxieties and situations that many can experience during a break(n)

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary, 65 million pound home in Mayfair, London which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the final crucial stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Carly and Phil in High Wycombe who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Carly feels like she has had enough of their current house and longs to move into one with more space, but Phil, on the other hand, is content with their four-bed semi and its location(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The White House in Swansea, where guests James and Jessica have an unusual toilet encounter in their room(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The dinner-party challenge arrives in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, where Sharon Pickles begins the week with a 1970s-inspired menu. Local celebrity Adam Sankey puts his reputation on the line with his seafood offerings, artist Nadia Carney goes big on presentation with her Moroccan evening and estate agent William LeGrys takes on three demanding courses when it's his turn to host(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Burnley, Lancashire, fiercely competitive Jane Dickinson takes on 'in it to win it' Mark Dempsey, wedding DJ Kev Riley and cable TV presenter Sally Jaxx, in a week that features a bout of exuberant self-praise, a friendly dog in a stripy jumper and a guest tasting chicken for the first time(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Waitress Lisa Bristow, art teacher Annie Hearne, prankster Dale Evans and Nicholas Witherick - who lives and works in a stately home - compete for the £1,000 prize as the dinner party challenge heads to south Buckinghamshire. Among the week's highlights are body art, little white lies and a hot-tempered argument during dessert(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Cardiff couples compete to win £1000 by throwing the perfect dinner party, serving up an American-themed evening, a night of vegan food, and a traditional menu(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Buffalo Wings & Rings president and CEO Nader Masadeh goes undercover to work in his own company to ensure his standards are being executed across the brand(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robert and Amy prepare to tie the knot in a classic Barone family wedding ceremony - but the groom becomes suspicious when his future brother-in-law Peter tries to make peace with both him and Ray. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert and Amy finally get married in the Barone family tradition. Brad Garrett and Monica Horan star(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick announces he is unable to visit at Christmas, prompting a dejected Frasier to volunteer to work over the festive period. Unfortunately, he soon finds his callers are even more depressed than he is, and seeks solace in a late-night diner. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin spends a romantic evening with a neighbour - to the surprise of Frasier, who causes family friction by discussing their date on his radio show. Meanwhile, Roz goes out with a Star Trek fan. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Mal and Sue from Suffolk, who are looking to retire to Spain. She shows them five properties around Vera, hoping one will fall within their budget of £70,000(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A Yorkshire can-can dancer in France teaches her amateur troupe a classic routine, while in Spain, a Buckinghamshire couple's cycling holiday venture hits the skids(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The host takes on a classic 1930s terraced home with a kitchen that's so tiny the fridge and oven have to live in another room. The two mismatched fireplaces are causing marital strife, with one of the couple loving the original 1930s one, and the other favouring the Victorian reproduction. Only one fireplace can stay in George's new art deco-inspired scheme. Plus, he revisits a Victorian home where George previously helped renovate the bottom two floors(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors investigate the underlying medical conditions that may have caused a motorist to crash into a lamppost, while the patient's son and his friend recount the influence she has had on both their lives. A man who fell during the night is treated for possible head trauma, and the father of a three-year-old patient reveals how his stepfather inspired him to be the best parent he can be(n)

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary, 65 million pound home in Mayfair, London which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace wrestles with a newly wed dilemma - she only has two tickets for The Nutcracker on Christmas Eve, and cannot decide whether to take Will or Leo. Eric McCormack and Debra Messing star(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctors examine a mother who drove into her garage door after losing control of her muscles. They wonder if numerous fertility treatments could be to blame for her symptoms - but House thinks an illicit drug is the real cause. Stacy decides to tell her husband about what happened in Baltimore, while a furious Wilson warns her not to hurt his friend again. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic seizes a chance to exact revenge on an old rival who had him thrown out of college - even though his plan involves giving himself a painful migraine. A burns victim's unusual brain activity has the team baffled when tests turn up no likely cause. Waking the patient leaves him in agony, but provides House with valuable information. Starring Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market. English teacher Muhammad is suffering from serious financial difficulty as his tenant has refused to pay rent for more than four months - and to make matters worse, the tenant has been subletting rooms in his property. In north-west London, a bedsit fire exposes a negligent landlord, while in Cheshire, Carl is shocked to hear squatters are living in his property(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A couple of landlords fall foul of two young YouTube stars who are using their rental property as a film set - and to make matters worse, the tenants have stopped paying their rent but are refusing to leave. In Chelmsford, eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict a group of squatters from an abandoned printworks, and in Hampstead, London, a landlord investigates when neighbours complain about noise from one of his flats(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost £8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect £3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. The job begins peacefully, until one of the agents is physically assaulted by the debtor's wife. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost £2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly £3,500 from a businessman in West London(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in West London(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Aaron and David's plans are scuppered when Lisa reveals she is pregnant. David is despondent, but Paul has an idea that might lift his spirits(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie is devastated when Colby ends things, and Ziggy acquires an ally at the track and is annoyed when Dean turns up(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The team tries to unravel the symptoms of a woman who suffered a seizure in the bath and almost drowned her four-week-old son. House realises Chase has asked to be reassigned, and Wilson tells his grumpy friend that Cuddy has asked him to dinner - prompting both men to wonder about the motives behind the invitation. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A girl who has developed unsettling hallucinations since surviving Hurricane Katrina is brought into the hospital by a man claiming to be her father - who House recognises from his days as a jazz musician. The medic does not believe the patient is his old friend's daughter, and wonders whether her apparent links to a famed pianist could provide a clue to her ailment. Hugh Laurie stars(n)

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Immigrants who claim welfare to support children who live back in their home countries. Self-employed scrap-metal collector and father-of-three Ion came to the UK at the start of 2014 and estimates he gets £1,200 in benefits a month, and is spending virtually all of it renovating his family home back in rural Romania. Evita Kossmann lives in Warsaw and gets around £220 a month in British benefits for her 10-year-old son Mateusz because her husband Sebastian resides and works in Bristol(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: Profile of a 67-year-old Somerset man who is hoping to get married for the ninth time, once his 27-year-old fiancee arrives from the Philippines. Ron believes that having Cristel around to care for him during in his old age will make him less of a burden on the state. Plus, a Lowestoft carer who looks after his wife hopes that moving into their first proper home together will bring them more happiness, and an out-of-work Liverpool man dreams of a life on the ocean waves(n)

programme.title: Me & My 10 Kids: Mega Families
programme.desc: Documentary following the hectic lives of two British families wrestling with the struggles and joys of raising 10 kids apiece(n)

Thriller, starring Saffron Burrows, Thomas Jane, Stellan Skarsgard, LL Cool J and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A man in urgent need of a heart transplant is rejected by the committee on the grounds that he is too old, but House attempts to find a way round the problem by appropriating the slightly damaged organ of a car-crash victim on life support. However, his team is not keen to let the operation go ahead - and neither is the potential donor's furious husband. Hugh Laurie plays the grumpy medic(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The grumpy medic is convinced a man with serious lung damage and a skin rash has been poisoned by heavy metals. He wonders whether the patient's wife is involved - though the team contend that the tests disprove the diagnosis. Meanwhile, House tires of having Wilson stay with him. Hugh Laurie and Robert Sean Leonard star(n)

programme.desc: A landlord offers a former tenant the use of a spare room until she gets back on her feet, but then struggles to evict her - and things get even more difficult when the woman moves her partner in. A landlord travelling abroad has to return to London when her tenants stop paying the rent, and Harrow Council officers find 30 mattresses in a flat designed for four people(n)

programme.desc: A doctor is forced to call in an eviction lawyer when his tenant, who owes him thousands of pounds in arrears, refuses to leave. Brent council officers conduct a raid in north-west London, finding more than 30 men living in a single house, and a landlady inspects her property after her tenant, an extreme hoarder, dies(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. programme.title: House
programme.desc: While examining a man with a severely enlarged tongue, House is shot by the husband of a former patient who holds the doctor responsible for his wife's suicide. As the injured medic instructs the team to find the cause of his patient's swelling, he realises his own pain has disappeared - but the operation to remove the bullet appears to have affected his mind as well as his nerves. Guest starring Elias Koteas(n)

programme.title: House

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The doctors struggle to find out why a girl suffers an allergic reaction in a sterile room after a heart transplant, until her boyfriend admits sneaking in for a late-night visit. After questioning him closely, House believes medication being taken by her partner could be the cause, but soon realises her problem is far more complicated. Michelle Trachtenberg guest stars(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A boy's symptoms remind House of a previous patient, who died before her condition could be diagnosed. Despite warnings from Cuddy, he becomes determined to find out what is wrong with the child - but when the results of tests for an extremely rare disease come back negative, the team struggles to come up with another possible scenario. Hugh Laurie plays the grumpy medic(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Mansfield mother-of-two Kerrie was left feeling betrayed after renting her house to a friend in need, who then stopped paying any rent. To add insult to injury, she also ruined the house by keeping too many dogs at the property. Mental health nurse Emmanuel found himself in a financial hole when his tenant stopped paying rent or answering his calls, and a landlord in Notting Hill ended up being owed £16,000 after five months of receiving no rent(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A furious landlord discovers his tenant has been subletting his exclusive north-west London flat - having not paid any rent for months. In Woolwich, squatters with a baby are given two weeks to find somewhere new to live, while a High Court enforcement officer helps an Essex grandmother evict her non-paying tenants in Dagenham(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement officers visit a former professional footballer who owes £4,500 in unpaid legal fees, and in London the officers chase up a £4,000 debt owed by a car dealer. Elsewhere, agents Gary Brown and Cona Jackson are involved in a serious altercation with a young man who owes almost £11,000, who threatens the officers with a knife when they start listing goods to seize to offset the debt(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers chase a debt of almost £2,000 in unpaid parking fines, and later encounter the extraordinary case of a debt of £80,000 owed by a hotel owner to his ex-girlfriend. However, as they begin to search the property, they call upon police back-up as the agents fear the debtor may have access to firearms. Elsewhere, two officers head to a car garage in Manchester where the owner owes £2,000 after losing a court case over a faulty vehicle(n)

Struggling to find a solution to the patient's blood-clotting problem and hallucinations, the doctor's depression becomes increasingly acute. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal stabbing of a taxi driver whose body was left under his vehicle. The finger of suspicion points to a man who took a drunken ride in the cab on the same night - an ex-convict who is also a gifted writer - and his protege, whose fingerprints were found on a book and cigar left at the scene. Saul Rubinek, JK Simmons and Sonia Braga guest star alongside Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to help a seriously injured and traumatised woman remember the events that led to the fatal shooting of her street dancer boyfriend in their hotel room. Mac pursues a lead suggesting the victim was killed by a rival artist - but Hawkes makes a breakthrough in the lab that indicates he was targeted by someone he should have been able to trust. Gary Sinise stars(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man falls from a bridge in what appears to be a straightforward suicide, but lab results reveal he was shot in the chest before being thrown off. Hawkes dives into the Hudson River to search for the murder weapon, and discovers an antique that reveals the 'Compass killer' has returned and claimed his third victim. Crime drama, starring Hill Harper(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: A simple surveillance case at a karaoke bar in Little Korea escalates to full danger, forcing Shade and Angie to call in familiar reinforcements for help(n)

programme.desc: Four murders occur in Manhattan, all of which seem to have been committed by the same sniper. Ty Burrell (Modern Family) guest stars(n)

programme.desc: A former soldier comes to trial for the murder of a Yemeni immigrant he suspected of being a terrorist. With the events of September 11 still fresh in everyone's minds, McCoy tries to find a way of ensuring the jury's fears and prejudices do not influence their verdict. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal shooting of two professors, which occurred soon after one of the academics campaigned against the treatment of women in the Middle East. Their inquiries lead them to a Muslim with strong beliefs - and an extreme dislike of females. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's idyllic winter weekend at a ski lodge takes a terrifying turn as her snowbound fellow guests are stalked by a fanatic with murder in mind. Angela Lansbury stars, with a guest appearance by Emma Samms(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica heads to West Virginia to come to the aid of one of her former students, who has been arrested for murder - but the unfriendly locals are less than happy about her investigation. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bookmaker is arrested on suspicion of murdering his business partner - and his attorney puts together an unconventional case that effectively turns the whole trial into a political statement. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star(n)

programme.desc: Once Shepherd convinces Keaton that Anna Cruz is an FBI mole working for Tal, Keaton and the team spy on one of their own, hoping Cruz will lead them to Tal(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a man is shot outside a gay club, the detectives' investigations lead to his family, where they discover the wife of the dead man has a turbulent past. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team's search for a serial rapist leads to a suspect who as a child was the victim of the same type of crime at the hands of his father - prompting his lawyer to cite genetics as the reason for his actions. Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when a man is found badly beaten in a plush hotel. They discover he was working for a male escort service - and soon unearth a connection with three similar attacks. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when a waitress is kidnapped from outside a diner - and they discover a possible connection with four earlier murders which bear the hallmarks of a serial killer. The case piles pressure on Munch, who has failed to capture the psychopath in the past. Drama, starring Richard Belzer and Ice-T(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. However, just as the lethal injection is about to be administered, a guard drops dead - and a riot ensues that brings Hawkes face to face with one of his old enemies. Guest starring Harold Perrineau (Lost, Oz) and Edward Furlong (Terminator 2, American History X)(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac witnesses a suspicious exchange of briefcases from his window while recuperating from an injury at home, and the strange goings-on lead to murder. programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have their hands full investigating four homicides, including the killing of a husband by his distraught wife and the murder of a woman who had a complex relationship with two brothers. programme.desc: The team investigates the stabbing of a teacher whose body has been found in a caretaker's cupboard. Legal drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a female rock singer, who apparently died of an overdose of cocaine and heroin. programme.desc: Based in New York researching her next book, Jessica intervenes when a jeweller is murdered and a famous actress's tiara worth millions is stolen. She establishes a news reporter as the prime suspect. Starring Angela Lansbury, Michael Horton and Jean Peters(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A perfectly preserved plane is discovered in a remote Alaskan ice field, but unfortunately for Jessica, investigators believe it was the scene of a crime committed by her late husband in 1952. Richard Roundtree guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A notorious drug dealer is murdered and suspicion falls on two possible culprits - a priest with a reputation as a vigilante, and the father of a teenager who died of an overdose. Briscoe and Green attempt to discover whether either of them took the law into his own hands. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A witness to a jewellery store robbery that went tragically wrong fails to appear in court. McCoy suspects foul play - until it transpires the man has been on the run for the past 20 years. Police drama, guest starring Mandy Patinkin of Criminal Minds fame, with Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers faulty bulletproof vests in an abandoned truck filled with stolen USMC merchandise, and attempts to locate the source of the cargo and any vests that could have been sent to military personnel overseas. Crime drama, guest starring Challen Cates, with Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Chris's actions give cause for concern when he searches for weapons in a club. Elsewhere, Andy helps Sam investigate a missing persons case. Starring Missy Peregrym and Gregory Smith(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Foster parents are accused of murdering a five-year-old in their care, but it seems their son's video game obsession could be the real key to her death - until the victim's biological mother snatches her other daughters from the house. Hard-hitting police drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead following what appears to have been an auto-erotic encounter, Benson and Stabler make a link with the case of a male stripper claiming to have been raped during a hen night. While Cabot prosecutes the sexual assault case, the detectives find that the girl's seemingly accidental death was actually murder. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson investigate the murder of a woman found buried in a courtyard along with a collar and leash. The victim's estranged twin sister reveals she had run away from her abusive husband - but was also in the habit of acquiring wealthy lovers and taking advantage of their money. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a pregnant woman, with Benson convinced she was having an affair. programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murderer wages a cyber war on healthcare workers he holds a grudge against. Calling himself Grave Digger, the killer enmeshes Mac in his scheme, claiming there is a bond between them - but the team has an opportunity to foil his plan when he unwittingly reveals the identity of his next target. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman confesses to murdering her husband, but the evidence clears her of any wrongdoing and raises several disturbing new lines of inquiry - including the possibility that a serial killer may be stalking the city. programme.desc: Briscoe and Green question a comedian in connection with the death of his adopted child, and uncover allegations that he molested an 11-year-old boy years previously. Reopening the case, they investigate a tangled tale of greed, deceit and broken trust involving the alleged victim's parents. Starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a struggling actress in what appears to have been a bungled robbery. programme.desc: Two thieves discover the skeletal remains of a woman who was believed to have died in the September 11 attacks on the World Trade Centre. programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits a friend's Arizona ranch - but as soon as she arrives, the community is plunged into disarray by a local psychic's sinister predictions. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Grady prepares for his wedding day, but the event is marred by an untimely death with a connection to his father-in-law's estate. With Jessica among the guests, it is not long before the culprit is taken into custody. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a luxury sports car dealer and identify a link between the victim's last customer and a recent spate of robberies. However, the discovery that their prime suspect has learning difficulties soon leads the team to his manipulative girlfriend. Detective drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: New York's district attorneys investigate the mysterious death of a stockbroker who was dating the daughter of a ruthless cosmetics mogul - and find themselves caught up in a wrangle over whether HRT withdrawal can be used as a defence in law. Police drama, guest starring Lucie Arnaz, with Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.desc: DiNozzo confronts a man impersonating a Navy officer, which results in guns being drawn, and the only eyewitness to the case is the Special Agent's father - who is in town to disclose a secret to his son. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Fin revisits his military roots when a fellow Army ranger struggles to recover from a sexual assault. Sarah Booth guest stars, with Ice T and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler is personally affected by the team's investigation into the case of a woman whose unborn child was removed from her body via a crude Caesarean section two months before its due date. programme.title: Conspiracy of Hearts (1960)
programme.desc: A group of courageous Italian nuns risks everything during the Second World War. Drama, starring Lilli Palmer, Sylvia Syms, Yvonne Mitchell, Ronald Lewis and Albert Lieven(n)
